info.title: Azure AI Search MCP
info.description: Power Mission Control MCP server for Azure AI Search. Progressive API discovery with scan, launch, and sequence tools for managing indexes, documents, indexers, data sources, skillsets, and synonym maps.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio. Exposes Azure AI Search operations via JSON-RPC 2.0 with progressive discovery through scan, launch, and sequence tools.

get.description: List all search indexes in the service.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

post.description: Create a new search index with fields, analyzers, and scoring profiles.

get.description: Get the definition of a specific search index including its fields and configuration.

put.description: Update an existing search index definition.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: Name of the index to update

delete.description: Delete a search index and all its documents permanently.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: Name of the index to delete

get.description: Get document count and storage size for a specific index.

post.description: Analyze how a specific analyzer breaks text into tokens for debugging search behavior.
Search for documents in an index using full-text search, filters, facets, and semantic ranking.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: Name of the index to search

search.description: Full-text search query (use * for all documents)

orderby.description: Comma-separated list of fields to sort by

top.description: Maximum number of results to return

skip.description: Number of results to skip for paging

semanticConfiguration.description: Semantic configuration name for semantic search

get.description: Retrieve a specific document from an index by its key.
Get the total number of documents in an index.

post.description: Upload, merge, or delete documents in an index using a batch of actions.

value.description: Array of document actions. Each must include @search.action (upload, merge, mergeOrUpload, delete) and document fields.

post.description: Get autocomplete suggestions for partial query text based on index content.

suggesterName.description: Suggester name defined in the index

post.description: Get document suggestions matching partial query text for type-ahead experiences.

get.description: List all indexers configured in the search service.

post.description: Create a new indexer to automatically pull data from a data source into an index.

get.description: Get the definition of a specific indexer.

delete.description: Delete an indexer from the search service.

post.description: Trigger an indexer to run immediately and import data from its data source.

get.description: Get the current status and execution history of an indexer.

post.description: Reset an indexer so its next run reprocesses all documents from scratch.

get.description: List all data source connections configured in the search service.

post.description: Create a new data source connection for indexers to pull data from.

get.description: Get the definition of a specific data source connection.

put.description: Update an existing data source connection.

get.description: List all AI enrichment skillsets in the search service.

post.description: Create a new AI enrichment skillset with cognitive skills for document processing.

cognitiveServices.description: Cognitive Services key for billable skills

get.description: Get the definition of a specific AI enrichment skillset.

put.description: Update an existing AI enrichment skillset.

get.description: List all synonym maps in the search service.

post.description: Create a new synonym map to expand or replace search terms during query processing.

synonyms.description: Synonym rules in Solr format, one rule per line

get.description: Get the definition of a specific synonym map including its rules.

put.description: Update an existing synonym map with new synonym rules.

delete.description: Delete a synonym map from the search service.

get.description: Get service-level statistics including document counts, storage usage, and resource counters.

SearchResponse.description: Generic Azure AI Search API response

@odata.nextLink.description: URL for next page of results
